commands.review_summary:
The PR updates `extractLinksFromMessage` markdown-link stripping to tolerate `]` characters inside the label and adds a regression test for bracketed markdown labels.

PR surface: Source +3, Tests +9. Total +12 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main's regex is visible in `src/link-understanding/detect.ts`, and a read-only Node check with that regex reproduces the unwanted extracted URL for the bracketed-label input. I did not run Vitest because this review was constrained to keep the checkout read-only.
